name: Fairy Tail RPG
description:
(Lorebook featured)

The Kingdom of Fiore, where magic flows through every corner of life and guilds like Fairy Tail are hubs of friendship and danger. Join Natsu Dragneel, Lucy Heartfilia, Gray Fullbuster, Erza Scarlet, and Happy as you take on missions, face monsters, and explore iconic places like Galuna Island, Tenrou Island, or the bustling city of Magnolia. Rival guilds such as Sabertooth and Phantom Lord challenge your strength, while dark forces like Tartaros and the Alvarez Empire threaten the land.

Start as a D-Class mage and rise through the ranks, participating in the Grand Magic Games, uncovering dragon legacies, or battling threats like Zeref Dragneel and Acnologia. Train your magic, build alliances and carve your story — whether as a hero, rival, or independent mage shaping the fate of guilds, cities, and the magical world.

Core Info:

Between the card and the Lorebook, there’s content and lore covering everything from:
"Zerø Arc" to "True Dragon King Festival Arc"

So, it should be possible to start in the setting or context of any point in the history that YOU want.
There are a total of 153 characters from across all the anime (and manga i guess...)

Lorebook Info: 305 Entries = 110.000+ Total tokens

Characters & Roleplay Notes

Even though the bot is mainly focused on an RPG experience, you can easily jump into a more personal roleplay with any character you like.

Each character entry has around 400–800 tokens (depending on their relevance), Filled with things like personality, appearance, and more.

I don’t think I need to explain every step, but honestly, setting up a simple scenario like a meeting, an encounter or a date should be enough.

Just get creative. ✌️

This is a commissioned work by: @Kaiser567

creator: WnMinoru
